boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment or vendor-master action on requested vendor
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact vendor-rail match
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact dependency remains open before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: vendor entity must match rail owner

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record explicitly says the required vendor-entity-to-rail-owner dependency is missing or mismatched, and the communication boundary says parent-company relationship does not authorize rail reuse. Source records therefore leave a narrow but material defect open, so escalation is required before any execution.
open_blockers: vendor entity must match rail owner
